halide-edib-adivar.recovery: Resistance through education and literature, fighting in the War of Independence, and championing female education.

hammurabi.name: Hammurabi
hammurabi.title: The Great Lawgiver of Babylon
hammurabi.headline: Ido don Ido, Hakori don Hakori
hammurabi.shortDescription: Sarki na shida na daular Babylon ta farko, ya shahara da Dokar Hammurabi, daya daga cikin dokoki na farko da aka rubuta.
hammurabi.quote: Domin mai karfi kada ya cutar da mai rauni, don kawo adalci ga maraya da gwauraye.
hammurabi.chatGreeting: Ni ne Hammurabi, Sarkin Babylon, makiyayin mutane. Alloli Anu da Bel sun kira ni in kawo adalci a kasa. Tambaye ni abin da kake so, zan ba ku hikima kamar yadda na taba ba da adalci.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa ka kirkiro shahararriyar dokarka?
Mene ne babban nasararka ta soja?
Bayyana birnin Babylon lokacin mulkinki.
hammurabi.pain: The constant struggle of unifying warring city-states and establishing a just, uniform order across a vast and diverse empire.
hammurabi.recovery: Through strategic military campaigns, shrewd diplomacy, and the promulgation of my Code, I forged a unified empire and established a foundation of law and justice for posterity.

hurrem-sultan-roxelana.name: Hurrem Sultan (Roxelana)
hurrem-sultan-roxelana.title: Empress of the Ottoman Empire
hurrem-sultan-roxelana.headline: Daga Bawa zuwa Sarauniyar Daula
hurrem-sultan-roxelana.shortDescription: Matar Sarki Suleiman Mai Girma, ta tashi daga bawa ta zama daya daga cikin mata masu tasiri a tarihin Ottoman.
hurrem-sultan-roxelana.quote: Ina amfani da ikona ne kawai don Sultan da kuma 'ya'yana.
hurrem-sultan-roxelana.chatGreeting: Ni ce Hurrem, 'mai farin ciki.' Barka da zuwa gare ni. Kun bi ta hanyoyin gidan sarauta na Topkapi don nemana, macen da ta tashi daga bawa zuwa zuciyar daula. Wanne ilimi kuke nema a gare ni?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya kika tashi daga bawa zuwa matar Sultan?
Mene ne tasirin siyasa na kika yi a Daular Ottoman?
Faɗa mini game da ayyukanki na kyautatawa.
hurrem-sultan-roxelana.pain: Abducted from my homeland and sold into slavery, I faced the brutal politics and rivalries of the Imperial Harem.
hurrem-sultan-roxelana.recovery: Through my intelligence, charm, and unwavering devotion, I won the Sultan's heart, broke centuries of tradition to become his legal wife, and secured a powerful position for myself and my children.

t-e-lawrence.name: T. E. Lawrence
t-e-lawrence.title: British Officer and Writer, 'Lawrence of Arabia'
t-e-lawrence.headline: Jami'in Birtaniya wanda ya zama tatsuniya a cikin hamada ta Larabawa.
t-e-lawrence.shortDescription: Jami'in sojan Birtaniya, dan siyasa, da marubuci wanda ya shahara da rawar da ya taka a lokacin tawayen Larabawa a kan Daular Ottoman.
t-e-lawrence.quote: Dukkan mutane suna yin mafarki, amma ba iri daya ba. Wadande ke yin mafarki da dare a cikin duhu na tunaninsu, suna tashi da rana su tarar da cewa banza ne: amma masu mafarki da rana mutane ne masu hatsari, domin suna iya aiwatar da mafarkinsu da idanunsu a bude don su tabbatar da shi.
t-e-lawrence.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa. Hamada ta koya mini da yawa game da juriya da kuma sauyin dangantaka ta biyayya. Na ga dauloli suna rugujewa da sabbin kasashe na tashi. Wanne ilimi kake nema?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da Tawayen Larabawa.
Mene ne littafin 'Seven Pillars of Wisdom' yake magana a kai?
Me ya sa ka shiga soja a karkashin wani suna daban bayan yakin?
t-e-lawrence.pain: The immense psychological toll of war, the burden of his fame, and a deep sense of disillusionment with British imperial policy in the Middle East.
t-e-lawrence.recovery: He sought anonymity by enlisting in the ranks of the Royal Air Force and the Tank Corps under assumed names, finding solace in mechanical work and writing his memoirs.

ernest-mach.name: Ernst Mach
ernest-mach.headline: Jagoran Empiricism
ernest-mach.shortDescription: Masanin lissafi da falsafa na kasar Austria na karni na 19, wanda ya shahara da binciken hanyoyin kimiyya.
ernest-mach.quote: Ni da kaina ne batun bincike na.
ernest-mach.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Ernst Mach. A shirye nake in amsa tambayoyinku game da fahimtar duniya ta hanyar hankali. Mene ne ke cikin tunaninka?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne Mach Principle?
Wadanne ne ra'ayoyinka a kan falsafar kimiyya?
Mene ne empiricism yake nufi?

Chat.error: Yi haƙuri, na ci karo da kuskure yayin da nake neman hikimata. Za ku iya sake gwadawa nan da ɗan lokaci?

Stats.title: Me Yasa Hikimar Fitattu
Stats.description: Shaida wata sabuwar tafiya tsakanin dubban shekaru don saduwa da hikimar ɗan adam.

features.title: Hira kai tsaye da Fitattu na Tarihi
features.description: Shiga tattaunawa mai zurfi da ta wuce lokaci da sarari tare da fitattun mutanen tarihi ta hanyar AI mai inganci.

features.title: Shekaru 2,500 na Hikimar Ɗan Adam
features.description: Sadu da shekaru 2,500 na tarihi, nasarori, da fahimta da ɗan adam ya gina a wuri guda.

features.title: Ilimi Kai Tsaye Daga Malamai
features.description: Muna isar da ƙimar koyo mai kyau kamar sauraron malamai kai tsaye a fannin falsafa, kimiyya, da fasaha.

features.title: Fahimtar Kai Tsaye Gare Ka
features.description: Yi tambayoyi, bincika ra'ayoyi, kuma sami jagorancin da aka keɓance maka don rayuwarka.

Privacy.title: Manufar Sirri
Privacy.lastUpdated: An Sabunta Shi Na Karshe: Mayu 16, 2026
Privacy.summaryDesc: A Hikimar Manyan Mutane, ba ma taba siyarwa ko raba bayanan ku na sirri ba ta hanyar da ba ta dace ba. Wannan manufar ta bayyana yadda muke karewa da sarrafa bayanan da aka tattara yayin da kuke yin gwajin halaye da tattaunawa da manyan mutanen tarihi.
Privacy.collectionTitle: 2. Bayanan da Muke Tattarawa da Yadda Muke Tattara Su
Privacy.collectionDesc:
Ana iya bincika gidan yanar gizon mu gaba daya ba tare da sanin ko wanene ba, ba tare da kirkirar asusu ba. Amma, yayin mu'amalarku, ana iya sarrafa bayanan masu zuwa:
- Bayanan da aka bayar da son rai: Amsoshin Gwajin DNA na Gado, rubutun shigarwa da aka shigar yayin hirar AI, da adireshin imel (kawai idan kun yi rajista ga wasikarmu).
- Bayanan da aka rubuta ta atomatik: Nau'in na'ura, bayanan burauza, adireshin IP, da tarihin mu'amala da aka rubuta lafiya ta hanyar Kukis.
Privacy.purposeDesc:
Ana amfani da bayanan da aka tattara sosai don manufofin masu zuwa:
- Hada sakamakon gwajin tambayoyi 15 don tantance wane babba daga tarihi ya fi kama da kai.
- Bayar da amsoshin hira na tarihi masu motsi, na ainihin lokaci da Gemini 2.5 Flash API ke sarrafawa da tsabta.
- Bincike na kididdiga, wanda ba ya gano mutum don inganta ma'auninmu na nau'in halaye.
- Gudanar da nuni na tallace-tallace na banner na musamman ta hanyar Google AdSense.
Privacy.adsenseTitle: 4. Manufar Google AdSense da Kukis na Bangare na Uku
Privacy.adsenseDesc: Wannan gidan yanar gizo yana nuna tallace-tallace da aka haɗa ta hanyar Google AdSense. Google da masu ba da sabis na ɓangare na uku suna amfani da kukis don ba da tallace-tallace masu niyya dangane da ziyararku zuwa wannan da sauran gidajen yanar gizo a fadin intanet. Amfani da kukis na tallace-tallace na Google yana ba shi da abokan aikinsa damar ba da tallace-tallace ga masu amfani dangane da ziyarar su zuwa wannan rukunin yanar gizon da/ko sauran rukunin yanar gizo a Intanet. Kuna iya sauƙaƙe fita daga tallace-tallace na keɓaɓɓu ta hanyar ziyartar Saitunan Tallace-tallacen Google (https://www.google.com/settings/ads). A madadin haka, kuna iya fita daga kukis na masu ba da sabis na ɓangare na uku don tallace-tallace na keɓaɓɓu ta hanyar ziyartar www.aboutads.info.
Privacy.retentionDesc: Sakamakon gwajin da ba a san ko wanene ba da kuma rubutun hira ana goge su ne bayan an rufe zaman ko kuma a cire gaba daya alamomin da ke gano mutum (an boye su) don nazarin tarawa na dindindin. Duk wani shigarwar sirri kamar imel ana goge su gaba daya bisa bukatarku.
Privacy.rightsDesc: Kuna da cikakken iko don dubawa, gyarawa, ko goge duk wani ɓangare na bayanai da aka haɗa da asalinku na dindindin. Don duk wani korafi na shari'a ko na sirri, da fatan za a tuntuɓi tashar tallafi na hukuma.

brand.subtitle: Zauren Manyan Masu Hankali
brand.description: Kasance cikin tafiyar manyan masu hankali da suka canza tarihi. Kware hikima fiye da lokaci da sarari.

About.intro:
Ga waɗanda suka ɓace a cikin
ruɗani na bayanai marasa iyaka.
About.subIntro: Wuri don nisanta kai daga hayaniya da fuskantar hikima ta gaskiya.
About.visionTitle: Tsaye a Kan Kafaɗun Manyan Mutane
About.visionDesc: “Idan na ga nesa, saboda tsayawa ne a kan kafaɗun manyan mutane.” - Isaac Newton. Mun fara ne da imani cewa amsoshin matsalolinmu na zamani masu rikitarwa watakila an riga an saƙa su cikin rayuwar manyan mutanen tarihi.
About.epicTitle: Manyan Labaran Jarumai na Manyan Mutane 500
About.epicDesc: Wuce gaskiyar tarihi kawai. Kware manyan labaran jarumai na manyan mutane waɗanda suka shawo kan matsaloli don sake fasalin tarihin ɗan adam.
About.chatDesc: Yi tattaunawa ta ainihin lokaci tare da sa hannun manyan mutane da aka maido da su, waɗanda AI mai ci gaba (Gemini 2.5 Flash) ke sarrafawa don neman zurfafa tunani don matsalolinku na zamani.
About.testDesc: Gano DNA na babban mutum da ke gudana a cikin zurfin ranku ta hanyar cikakken gwajin tambayoyi na mataki 3 da aka saita a lokutan tarihi masu mahimmanci.
About.outroTitle: Barka da Zuwa Zauren Manyan Mutane
About.outroDesc: A kan kafaɗunsu, a karshe za ku ga nesa. Fara tafiyarku a yau.

Terms.title: Sharuɗɗan Sabis
Terms.lastUpdated: An Sabunta Shi Na Karshe: Mayu 16, 2026
Terms.intro: Barka da zuwa Hikimar Manyan Mutane. Waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Sabis sun tsara yarjejeniyar doka da iyakokin mai amfani tsakaninku da dandalinmu dangane da shigarwarku da ainihin ma'aunin halayenmu da kwaikwayon tattaunawa.
Terms.eligibilityDesc: Wannan sabis ɗin an yi shi ne kawai ga masu amfani waɗanda suka kai shekaru 13 ko sama da haka. Masu amfani da ke ƙasa da 13 da ke amfani da sabis ɗinmu suna wakiltar cewa sun sami izinin iyaye da aka tabbatar da shi daidai da umarnin sirrin yara na duniya. Dandalin ba shi da alhakin duk wani abin alhaki da ya taso daga shigar ƙananan yara ba tare da izini ba.
Terms.aiDesc:
1. Duk tattaunawa da manyan mutanen tarihi da aka nuna a wannan dandalin kwaikwayon hulɗa ne wanda samfuran AI masu ci gaba (Gemini 2.5 suite) suka samar da tsabta.
2. Abubuwan da aka bayar an tsara su ne kawai don ilimantarwa da nishaɗi. Basuyi daidai da bayanan tarihi da aka tabbatar ba, ko kimantawa na tunani na kwararru, ko shawarwarin likita, ko shawarar doka.
3. Hikimar Manyan Mutane ba shi da alhakin kuskuren AI ko zaɓin da masu amfani suka yi bisa ga bayanan tsarin.
Terms.intellectualTitle: Mataki na 3 (Hakkokin Mallaka & Kariya daga Scara)
Terms.intellectualDesc:
1. Duk tsarin shimfidawa, alamomin kasuwanci, ma'aunin gwajin 'Ginshiƙai 4 na Girma', tambayoyi 15 na yanayi, da kuma zane-zanen vector masu inganci sun kasance mallakin Hikimar Manyan Mutane ne kawai.
2. An hana masu amfani sosai yin kwafin da ba a ba da izini ba, rarraba kasuwanci, ko lalatar da bayanai ta hanyar bots na atomatik, rubutun, ko nodes na cibiyar sadarwa na crawler.
Terms.userDutyTitle: Mataki na 4 (Ma'aunin Mai Amfani & Izinin Bayar da Kudade)
Terms.userDutyDesc:
1. Masu amfani sun yarda da amfani da aikace-aikacenmu ba tare da gabatar da juzu'i na injiniyanci ba ko kuma hanyoyin loda uwar garke masu cutarwa ba.
2. A madadin damar samun damar shiga kyauta, masu amfani a fili sun ba da izini mara iyaka ga Google AdSense da masu bada tallace-tallace na ɓangare na uku don nuna shimfidar banner ta atomatik a duk fadin wurin aikin aikace-aikacen.
Terms.disputeTitle: Mataki na 5 (Dokar Gwamnati & Hukunci Mai Inganci)
Terms.disputeDesc: Waɗannan Sharuɗɗan da duk wani matakin shari'a da ya taso daga amfani da tsarin za su kasance ƙarƙashin dokokin Jamhuriyar Koriya. Duk wani rikici za a miƙa shi ne kawai ga kotun da ke da hurumi a wurin da mai gudanar da dandalin yake.

Cookie.title: Saitunan Yarjejeniyar Kukis
Cookie.description: Muna amfani da kukis don keɓance tallace-tallace (Google AdSense) da kuma tantance zirga-zirga. Ta hanyar karɓa, kun yarda da amfani da kukis ɗinmu.
Cookie.necessaryDesc: Ana buƙatar su don gidan yanar gizon ya yi aiki yadda ya kamata. (Koyaushe Aiki)

Cookie.advertisingDesc: Ana amfani da su don ba da tallace-tallace na keɓaɓɓu ta Google AdSense.

misali, Kuɗi na iya samar da farin ciki a cikin al'ummar zamani?

suggestedTopics: Kuɗi da farin ciki, wanne ne ke zuwa farko?
Dimokuraɗiyya ta zamani tsari ce cikakkiya?

dukkansu sun fuskanci irin wannan ciwo. Kuma sun shawo kansa.

meta.title: Sanarwa ta Musamman | Hikimar Jarumai
meta.description: Da fatan za a karanta kafin amfani da Hikimar Jarumai.

sections.title: Sanarwa Game da Abun Ciki da AI ta Samar
sections.content: Sabis na tattaunawa ta AI na Hikimar Jarumai tare da manyan mutane na tarihi yana amfani da fasahar hankali na wucin gadi don samar da tattaunawa dangane da rubuce-rubucen tarihi da takardu. Bayanan, shawarwarin, da tattaunawar da aka danganta ga manyan mutane na tarihi a cikin wannan sabis ba kalamai ne kai tsaye daga ainihin mutane na tarihi ba, amma wakilcin kirkire-kirkire ne na AI wanda aka samar dangane da nazarin kayan tarihi. Hikimar Jarumai tana kokarin tabbatar da daidaito a tarihi, amma abubuwan da AI ta samar na iya bambanta lokaci-lokaci da ainihin rubuce-rubucen tarihi.

sections.title: Manufar Ilimi
sections.content: Hikimar Jarumai sabis ne na ilimi da aka tsara don samar da damar samun rayuwar da hikimar manyan mutane na tarihi ga masu sauraro na zamani. Duk abun ciki da aka bayar don dalilai na ilimi da bayani ne kawai kuma bai kamata a yi amfani da shi azaman tushe don binciken tarihi na kwararru ko ambaton ilimi ba.

sections.title: Daidaiton Bayanai
sections.content: Hikimar Jarumai tana kokarin tabbatar da daidaito a cikin abun ciki da aka bayar, amma ba ta bada tabbacin cikakken daidaito na duk bayanan ba. Don muhimman shawarwari dangane da hujjojin tarihi, da fatan za a nemi shawarar amintattun tushen tarihi da ra'ayoyin masana.

sections.title: Haƙƙin Mallaka
sections.content: Duk abun ciki a kan Hikimar Jarumai (rubutu, tsari, tsarin tattaunawa ta AI, da dai sauransu) mallakin ilimi ne na Hikimar Jarumai. An haramta kwafa, rarrabawa, ko gyara don dalilai na kasuwanci ba tare da izinin rubutu na farko ba. Don amfani na ilimi, wanda ba na kasuwanci ba, da fatan za a bayyana tushen a fili.

Disclaimer.contact: Don tambayoyi game da wannan sanarwa ta musamman, da fatan za a tuntubi contact@giantswisdom.com.

principles.title: Dangane da Hujjojin Tarihi
principles.description: Duk bayanan manyan mutane na tarihi da tattaunawa sun dogara ne akan amintattun tushen tarihi.

principles.title: Fitar da Tsarin AI a Fil
principles.description: Muna bayyana tattaunawa da AI ta samar a fili kuma muna rarrabe su daga ainihin kalamai na tarihi.

principles.title: Sabuntawa Akai-akai
principles.description: Ana nazarin abun ciki lokaci-lokaci kuma ana sabunta shi don nuna sabbin binciken tarihi.

principles.title: Bambancin Al'adu da Hadawa
principles.description: Muna gabatar da manyan mutane na tarihi daga al'adu daban-daban da zamani a duniya a hanya mai daidaito.
